mapper.sql: id, order_id, product_id, product_name, product_img, price, quantity, total_amount, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_img, price, quantity, total_amount, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImg}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_order_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id

SELECT
FROM t_order_item WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order_item WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, price, quantity, total_amount, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
